criterion: P2.10 criterion 1 (ADR-0003): boole faucet claim --network testnet against a local fixture faucet, then at least one block appended, exit 0.
claimBoundary: closed local smoke; not public-network claim
notes: Volatile fields (nodeStartedAt, absolute /tmp store paths) are intentionally excluded; only deterministic chain/faucet evidence is pinned.
The mined block commitments are deterministic for the pinned runtime-smoke v1 scenario, so a divergence here flags a chain-state regression.
Closure does not constitute a public-network claim (ADR-0003): P2.10 is closed for closed-local testnet operability only.
